productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Compel White Sports Shoe
description: Designed in an attractive low profile silhouette for those with an active lifestyle, the nike Air Compel offers exemplary comfort in style. With a synthetic leather upper and designed perforations on the sides of the midfoot, there's no way your sneaker is going to escape complements. Upper Synthetic leather upper with nike swoosh overlays on either sides of the midfoot and stratgeically placed overlays for enhanced shoe structure and durability Perforations on the midfoot and tongue for breathable comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for a snug comfort Cushioned footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protection Midsole Phylon midsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with terraced lugs and herringbone grooves along the impact guidance lines for optimum grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
